dts.title: DVSA Wait Times Right Now — Where's the Shortest Queue in the UK?
dts.hook: Show a heatmap or list of UK test-centre wait times; reveal 2-3 cities where waits have surged vs. eased
dts.cta: Drop your test centre in the comments — I'll tell you if it's worth swapping
dts.why: Exploits search intent around DVSA delays; positions DTS as the authority on test-date intelligence

dts.title: What Is a Driving Test Date Swap? (How to Skip the Queue Legally)

athletics.title: Calisthenics Complex → Sprint Intervals — Full Training Session

athletics.title: Why I Train Sprints AND Calisthenics (The Method Most Athletes Miss)

athletics.why: Educational angle drives saves and shares, boosting algorithm reach beyond existing followers
